close_reason: All phases complete: Phase 1 (parser/staleness), Phase 2 (import detection/mapping), Phase 3 (tk integration/config). Feature is fully implemented with tk rules check/sync commands and auto-sync before buck2 commands when enabled.
description: Create a tool that automatically regenerates rules.star files when the source code changes a target's dependency graph. This would detect when Go imports change, Rust dependencies change, etc. and update the corresponding rules.star with the correct deps list.
title: Create tool to auto-update rules.star when dependencies change
